category_sources: source_facts.description describes a tool that verifies files against .editorconfig rules.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name identifies the project as editorconfig-checker.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo point to the official GitHub project; README is the official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions checking harmony with .editorconfig files; current_curation.tags marks it as CLI tooling.
